## Data Provenance

**PROVENANCE COMPLETE**

Analysis type:          rare-variant-cohort
Analysis description:   Rare variant pathway enrichment analysis of 460 neuroblastoma probands from the Kids First program using BIFO-conditioned Personalized PageRank over the Data Distillery Knowledge Graph.

Variant type:           germline
Input data type:        germline-rare-variants
Input data description: Seeds are genes carrying predicted deleterious germline variants (MAF<0.01, CADD>=20) in 460 pediatric neuroblastoma probands from the Kids First Pediatric Research Program. This is a germline rare variant analysis — not a somatic mutation analysis. The canonical somatic neuroblastoma drivers — MYCN amplification, TERT structural rearrangements, LIN28B overexpression, ALK activating mutations (somatic), and ATRX loss — are not expected in the seed list because they are primarily somatically acquired, not germline-disrupted. The enrichment signal reflects germline genetic predisposition burden across the cohort. Germline predisposition genes such as BARD1, ALK (germline), PHOX2B, and DNA repair genes are expected to appear.
